title: Context Management
description: Unified context windows shared across agents, enabling coherent multi-step reasoning without information loss between handoffs.

title: Tool Integration
description: Standardized tool-use protocol allowing agents to interact with databases, APIs, file systems, and external services through governed interfaces.

title: Security & Governance
description: Fine-grained permission models, audit logging, and policy enforcement ensuring every agent action is authorized, traceable, and compliant.
